summary: Community feedback on Chaya Berry Goose Studio's industrial noir and tech-wear brand highlights lifestyle image issues, garment requests, aesthetic adjustments, and popular products. Overall, the community wants more diverse prints, better fitting garments, and improved aesthetic consistency.

lifestyle_image_improvements.issue: More of this garment with different prints
lifestyle_image_improvements.action: add variety in print patterns and styles for similar garments

lifestyle_image_improvements.issue: this looks weird how the hands come out of the apron, but whatever
lifestyle_image_improvements.action: refine apron design to avoid awkward hand placement

aesthetic_adjustments.details: apply to all garments for consistency

popular_products.recommendation: transpose to new templates to improve aesthetic

prompt_modifiers_avoid: hands coming out of apron design
